blocks.text: Thanks, Kimberly, that is worth surfacing early rather than holding for the final read. A capital story that reads two ways is exactly the sort of thing a board wants named while there is still time to fix it, so let us not soften it.

I will chase the materials with Robert Smith today, the two earnings calls Kimberly Le flagged and whoever on his side can clear them for us. Once they are in I will send Robert a short interim note on the {{fact:f:E-2024-001.client}} findings so nothing in the full audit reads as a surprise, and I will offer him ten minutes by phone if he would rather walk the early read than take it cold.
